title: Just Enough Create (JEC)
description: Minecraft ModPack that offers over 50 create addons, and it's optimized!
body:
Minecraft ModPack with **over 50 Create Mod addons.** With this pack, you can even **explore space, thanks to Ad Astra!** Added **Thermal Dynamics, so you can focus on technology** and power big machines!

To optimize JEC, **I used Embeddium.** Please **do not use Optifine** because **it can break some of the mods,** like Create: New Age.

# Good to know:
To run this pack, you need a minimum of **4GB of RAM.**

This ModPack does **not support using shaders** because Optifine breaks the mods.

You can add more mods if you want; there's **no incompatibility.**

Because of no Optifine, you probably think you can't zoom. Yes, you can; **I added a zoom mod!**

## Links due to copyright:
[CreateCompressed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-compressed)

[CreateRecycleEverything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
